scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,web -c blue,green "bun run --cwd apps/gateway dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/gateway build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.check: bun run --cwd apps/gateway check && bun run --cwd apps/web check
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,web -c blue,green "bun run --cwd apps/gateway start" "bun run --cwd apps/web start"
